narrative:
Mtta East D (precinct in Washington County) has 938 registered voters, with 53.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.5 percentage points.
